title: Surgeon Vacancy at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Surgeon with drive and ambition, Columbia Asia Advisory Limited in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Columbia Asia Advisory Limited:
Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia Advisory Limited!
